events.name: app.opened
events.sourceSignal: Tauri app process starts and primary window is ready

events.name: screen.viewed
events.sourceSignal: User enters library, preview, or settings view

events.name: command.invoked
events.sourceSignal: Toolbar, menu, shortcut, or command palette action

events.name: error.occurred
events.sourceSignal: Handled PicPeek or SignalLake SDK error

acceptance: All mapped events are present in PicPeek manifest.
Dry-run SDK emits one batch with four events.
Forbidden file path and clipboard fields are rejected before enqueue.
Local relay accepts, pulls, and ACKs the batch.
No upload happens unless pilot harness explicitly calls relay.
